findspot: BM EA5647 hieratic writing-board (school exercise); redated Amenhotep II
source_provenance: Dautais & Gabolde 2022, JAEI, Crossing the Wine-Dark Sea (BM EA5647)
editorial_notes: GREEK name read via Linear B / Greek onomastics (LB form e-ka-sa-te-u). Dautais & Gabolde: EA5647 = earliest written evidence of GREEK names, ~decades before the first Linear B archives. => minoan_vs_greek_confidence LOW (Greek, not Minoan). USE AS NEGATIVE CONTROL / Greek-calibration for E4, NOT a Minoan anchor.
phonetic_uncertainty: Egyptian group-writing of a Greek name
